subject: fix(icons): remove duplicate icon.svg — single SVG source only
body:
Remove public/icon.svg (hand-maintained duplicate with rounded corners).
All icons now generated from the single source: assets/icon-source.svg.
Favicon uses the generated favicon.png (48x48). SVG entry removed from
PWA manifest — PNG icons provide full browser coverage.

Tags: icons, cleanup, single-source
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
